demographics.living_situation: lives at home, adult offspring nearby and able to help with transport

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach cramps are agonizing and come in waves, I have zero energy, and I've lost two belt sizes without trying. There's dark blood coming out when I go to the toilet and I'm really frightened.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The cramping got much worse today and keeps coming in waves, and I've been passing dark blood, so my son called for help.

symptom_narrative.onset: the bowel changes crept in over about 3 months; the severe waves of cramping pain got much worse today
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 months of changing bowel habit, 4 weeks of dark blood, and severe crampy pain that has escalated today
symptom_narrative.character: gripping, cramping belly pain that comes in waves; in between I feel bloated and blocked up
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the cramps are agonizing when they come, I have to stop and clutch my stomach
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across the lower belly, more on the left side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes in waves rather than being constant, and the waves are getting stronger and more frequent
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; a heating pad on my belly takes the edge off a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it seems to build up on its own; eating a proper meal seems to set the cramps off
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my stools have gone thin and pencil-like, I keep feeling like I need to go but can't fully empty, and I've been passing dark, tarry blood and sometimes bright red blood
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before; my bowels used to be regular
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm exhausted and washed out, moving slowly, and the pain stops me in my tracks

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: very anxious that this might be something serious like cancer; relies on his adult child for transport and support

objective_data_offered.value: lost about 10 kg (two belt sizes) over the last few months without trying, now around 68 kg
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-estimated weight loss, no calibrated serial weights

objective_data_offered.value: dark, tarry, almost black stools with some bright red blood mixed in over the past 4 weeks; stools have become thin and pencil-like
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient description of stool colour/calibre, not clinician-confirmed

objective_data_offered.value: looks pale and washed-out, moving slowly and clutching the abdomen during waves of pain
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: adult child's visual impression over video/phone
